items.text: A scheduled Wi-Fi maintenance will occur on March 15 from 2:00 AM to 6:00 AM. Internet access will be unavailable in the Library and Anderson Hall during this period. A $5 late fee applies for any overdue equipment not returned by March 14. Users are advised to save work before the window.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what will happen during the maintenance window?

options.A: A $5 fee will be charged for all users
options.B: Internet access will be unavailable in two buildings
options.C: The Library will close for the entire day
options.D: Equipment must be returned by March 15

questions.explanation: The notice states that Internet access will be unavailable in the Library and Anderson Hall during the period.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the notice?

options.A: The maintenance will affect all campus buildings
options.B: Users must pay the fee before the maintenance
options.C: The Wi-Fi will be restored by 2:00 AM
options.D: Users should prepare for the loss of connectivity

questions.explanation: The notice advises users to save work before the window, implying they should prepare for the loss of connectivity.

items.text: Spring Theater Show! 'The Lost Garden' by Student Players. March 3-7 at 7:30 PM in Main Auditorium. Tickets $5 at the door or online. Don't miss this amazing performance! Limited seating available.

questions.stem: According to the flyer, when will the theater show take place?

options.B: Every night at 7:30 PM in March

questions.explanation: The flyer states the show runs from March 3 to March 7.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the tickets for this show?

options.A: They are available only at the door
options.B: They cost more than $5 at the door
options.C: They may sell out due to limited seating
options.D: They are free for student players

questions.explanation: The flyer mentions limited seating and tickets are available, implying they may sell out.

items.text: Hi everyone, The Photography Club meeting has been rescheduled to this Friday at 3:00 PM in Room 204. Please bring $5 for the materials fee. See you there! Best, Ms. Chen

questions.stem: According to the email, what is the new time for the Photography Club meeting?
questions.explanation: The email states the meeting is rescheduled to this Friday at 3:00 PM in Room 204.

questions.stem: In the email, the word 'rescheduled' most nearly means:
questions.explanation: The email indicates the meeting was moved to a new time, so 'rescheduled' means moved to a different time.
